title: Greg Caves
body:
This mod is a expansion to vanilla cave system that able to generate huge and connective caves comparable to modern minecraft.

These giant caves usually only generates in the lower layers of the world, so they do not break your landscape on the surface.

Fully compatible with [BOP](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty) and [Et Futurum Requiem](https://modrinth.com/mod/etfuturum/).

This is a fork of [greggen](https://github.com/jaskarth/greggen), with the removal of unnecessary GT6 dependency.

![A huge cave with pillars.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c7dfdafce313700f7fa72d2d4c3b00ebf319fc1.jpeg)
